projectDescription: An Android SDK for encoding and streaming live video/audio to media servers using RTMP, RTSP, SRT, and UDP protocols.
keyFeatures: RTMP, RTSP, SRT, and UDP streaming protocols
H264, H265, AV1, AAC, G711, and OPUS codec support
OpenGL real-time video filters (40+ built-in filters)
Multiple video sources: Camera1, Camera2, CameraX, Screen, File, Buffer
Multiple audio sources: Microphone, Internal audio, File, Mix
Simultaneous multi-stream support to multiple endpoints
RTMPS/RTSPS TLS encryption and SRT AES encryption
Dynamic bitrate adaptation and congestion control
Android API 16+ support (API 21+ for modern features)
publicApiSurface: GenericStream — stream over RTMP/RTSP/SRT/UDP with automatic protocol detection
UdpStream — UDP/MPEG-TS unicast, multicast, and broadcast
StreamBase.changeVideoSource(source) — swap video source on the fly
StreamBase.changeAudioSource(source) — swap audio source on the fly
ConnectChecker — callback interface for connection events
BaseFilterRender — base class for custom OpenGL filters
VideoSource / AudioSource — base classes for custom sources
